text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
See? Feels good, right? If you go in with this
mindset, you'll win tomorrow's race for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I've got no doubt I'm gonna
win now! That means…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat you too, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-Hehe, whoops, that slipped out…
But that just shows how well your
cheer works!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is that so? You've got some nerve…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Juuust kidding! Nyehehe!
I'm ready to take you on anytime!
